summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RH Ponto Eletrônico, Folha de Pagamento, and Custos modules. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Fixed one bug: contas_pagar_collection was undefined in gerar-contas-pagar endpoint.

Backend: POST /api/rh/ponto - Create ponto record - PASSED

Backend: GET /api/rh/ponto/relatorio-mensal - Monthly report with overtime - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/ponto/registrar-rapido - Quick registration - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/rh/ponto/{id} - Update ponto record - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/rh/ponto/{id} - Delete ponto record - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/rh/ponto/{id} - Invalid ID returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/rh/folha-pagamento - List payroll by month/year - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/folha-pagamento - Create payroll with calculations - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/rh/folha-pagamento/{id}/holerite - Generate PDF - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/folha-pagamento/gerar-contas-pagar - Generate accounts payable - PASSED (after fix)
Backend: GET /api/rh/custos - List costs by employee - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/custos/simular-dissidio - Simulate collective bargaining impact - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/custos/simular-rescisao - Calculate termination provision - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/rh/custos/simular-rescisao - Invalid funcionario returns 404 - PASSED
Frontend: Ponto Eletrônico page loads with summary cards - PASSED
Frontend: Ponto page shows Jornada de Trabalho section - PASSED
Frontend: Folha de Pagamento page loads with totals - PASSED
Frontend: Folha page shows Tabelas de Alíquotas 2025 - PASSED
Frontend: Custos RH page loads with cost breakdown - PASSED
Frontend: Custos page shows Custo Real calculation formula - PASSED
Frontend: Dissídio simulation modal works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Rescisão simulation modal works correctly - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: contas_pagar_collection was undefined in gerar-contas-pagar endpoint - changed to db.contas_pagar
FGTS 8% calculation verified correct in both backend and frontend
Jornada de trabalho correctly configured: Seg-Sex 08:00-11:30/13:30-18:00, Sábado 08:00-12:00
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing funcionários (João Silva x2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RH Ponto, Folha Pagamento, and Custos modules fully tested and working. Key constants verified: FGTS 8%, INSS Patronal 20%, INSS progressivo 2025 (7.5%-14%), IRPF 2025 (0%-27.5%). Existing folha for Feb 2026 with ID bc6afc49-7d33-4b6b-a069-3c87127b0640. Two funcionários: João Silva (ID: 9f166c5e-f770-4657-bb1e-ae1f7fb9433b) and João Silva (ID: 887b6533-7fd1-406e-9fb2-6db096882837), both with R$ 3.500,00 salary.

bug_fixed.fix: Changed contas_pagar_collection.insert_one() to db.contas_pagar.insert_one() in 3 places (lines 10392, 10408, 10424)

verified_calculations.FGTS: 8% of salary - verified in custos endpoint
verified_calculations.INSS_Patronal: 20% of salary - verified in custos endpoint
verified_calculations.Multa_FGTS_Rescisao: 40% of FGTS balance - verified in simular-rescisao endpoint
verified_calculations.Aviso_Previo: 30 days + 3 days per year worked (max 90 days) - verified
